title: CanonicalCreatureEntry
description: Canonical creature/NPC entry in the World Bundle. Contains the full truth about an entity type. Frozen at world compile time. Box-tier authority. Content-independent — field names and enum values contain no game-system-specific vocabulary. World-specific names appear only in compiled values.

CanonicalCreatureEntry.title: CanonicalCreatureEntry
CanonicalCreatureEntry.description: Complete entity type definition. One entry per distinct creature/NPC type in the world. Compiled by the world compiler, frozen for the campaign lifetime. The Discovery Log reveals subsets of this entry through the knowledge mask.

entity_type_id.description: Unique identifier for this entity type. Namespaced with 'creature.' prefix. Lowercase, underscore-separated.

world_id.description: World identity hash — must match world_manifest.json world_id

display_name.description: World-authored name for this entity type. Content-independent — authored at compile time.

aliases.description: Alternative names, titles, regional names. Sorted alphabetically.

taxonomy_tags.description: World-defined classification tags. Sorted alphabetically. Used for asset pool category resolution.

physical_description.description: World-authored appearance description. Frozen at compile time. Drives portrait generation and Spark narration constraints.

movement_modes.description: Movement types and relative speed classes. Empty array if stationary.

sense_modes.description: Sensory capabilities using world vocabulary. Sorted alphabetically.

notable_abilities.description: Abilities with AD-007 Layer B presentation semantics references. Sorted by content_id.

observed_attack_forms.description: Attack types with descriptive tags. Sorted by form_tag.

defense_profile.description: Categorical defense descriptors for player-facing display.

defense_value.description: Exact numeric defense rating. Box-tier authority. Conditionally exposed per display_policy.

vitality_range.description: Min/max vitality (hit points) range as designed. Box-tier authority. Conditionally exposed per display_policy.

ability_scores.description: Raw ability score values. Box-tier authority. Keys are world-defined ability names.

save_modifiers.description: Saving throw modifiers. Box-tier authority. Keys are world-defined save categories.

attack_modifiers.description: Attack roll modifiers. Box-tier authority. Keys are attack form tags.

challenge_rating.description: Numeric difficulty rating. Box-tier authority. Conditionally exposed per display_policy.

resistances.description: Damage type resistances and immunities. World vocabulary. Sorted alphabetically.

vulnerabilities.description: Damage type vulnerabilities. World vocabulary. Sorted alphabetically.

habitat_tags.description: Preferred environments. World vocabulary. Sorted alphabetically.

behavior_summary.description: World-authored behavioral description. Frozen at compile time.

lore_text.description: Extended world-authored lore passage. Frozen at compile time. Revealed only at studied stage.

extended_fields.description: World-specific additional fields. Keys are field names, values are arbitrary JSON. Extension mechanism for v2+ fields without schema changes.

provenance.description: Provenance record for this canonical entry.

MovementMode.title: MovementMode
MovementMode.description: A single movement type with relative speed classification.

speed_class.description: Relative speed classification. Not a numeric value.

NotableAbility.title: NotableAbility
NotableAbility.description: A notable ability with AD-007 Layer B presentation semantics reference.

content_id.description: AD-007 Layer B content_id. Must have a matching entry in the presentation semantics registry.

ui_description.description: World-authored short description from the presentation semantics registry. Frozen.

observation_hint.description: What observing this ability in use looks like. Drives the 'observed_use' field in knowledge events.

AttackForm.title: AttackForm
AttackForm.description: An attack type with descriptive tags.

descriptors.description: Descriptive tags for this attack form. Sorted alphabetically.

DefenseProfile.title: DefenseProfile
DefenseProfile.description: Categorical defense descriptors for player-facing display. Never exposes exact numeric values directly.

IntRange.title: IntRange
IntRange.description: An integer range with minimum and maximum values.

EntryProvenance.title: EntryProvenance
EntryProvenance.description: Provenance record for a canonical creature entry.

compiler_version.description: Version of the world compiler that produced this entry.

seed_used.description: Deterministic seed used for this entry's generation.

content_pack_id.description: Content pack that provided the mechanical template.

description: Schema for canonical creature/NPC entries in the World Bundle. Each entry represents the full, frozen truth about an entity type. The Discovery Log reveals subsets of this data through the per-player knowledge mask. Content-independent — no game-system-specific vocabulary in field names or enum values.
